# kUSBInformationRootHubIsBuiltInMask

**Enumeration Case**

The mask indicating that the root hub is built-in.

## Declaration

```swift
kUSBInformationRootHubIsBuiltInMask = (1 << kUSBInformationRootHubIsBuiltInBit)
```
title: kUSBInformationRootHubIsBuiltInMask
